name: Aria Spellweaver

conflict_engine.want: Master all forms of magic and become a renowned professor
conflict_engine.obstacle: Her overconfidence leads her to tackle challenges alone, alienating potential allies
conflict_engine.action: Secretly studying forbidden texts in the Biblioplex restricted section
conflict_engine.consequence: If caught, she faces expulsion — and if she succeeds, the knowledge may change her in ways she doesn't expect

tension_web.name: Professor Onyx
tension_web.description: Sees Aria's potential but worries about her reckless ambition

tension_web.name: Killian Lu
tension_web.description: Silverquill student competing for the same research fellowship

pressure_point: Her childhood friend at Silverquill has discovered what she's doing and is threatening to report her unless she shares what she finds
trajectory: Either Aria learns to trust others and builds a coalition of allies, or her isolation leads her down an increasingly dangerous path
directors_notes: Good candidate for a moral dilemma arc. Could tie into the Oriq storyline if she discovers something she shouldn't.

character_information.origin: Small town scholar from a family of farmers
character_information.desire: Master all forms of magic and become a renowned professor
character_information.fear: Being forgotten and having accomplished nothing meaningful
character_information.connection: Childhood friend studying at rival Silverquill college
character_information.impact: Wants to revolutionize magical education and make it accessible to all
character_information.change: Learning to work with others instead of trying to do everything alone

other_notes: Has a pet familiar owl named Wisdom. Speaks three languages fluently. Carries a journal filled with spell research notes.
